---
name: '🐞 Bug Report'
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: ['bug']
assignees: ''
---

### Checklist

<!--
✅ Please make sure that you have completed the following steps before submitting the bug report:
-->

- [ ] I have searched the issues page for any duplicate issues open or closed and confirmed that this bug has not been reported before.
- [ ] I have tested the issue with the current build.
- [ ] I have attached log files and or uploaded FLAC compressed sample data, and command/version used so that the issue can be easily reproduced by the developers.
- [ ] This issue is related to [tbc-tools](https://github.com/harrypm/tbc-tools/issues) (please make an issue on the tools repo directly.)
- [ ] This issue is related to [ld-decode](https://github.com/happycube/ld-decode/issues) or [decode-orc](https://github.com/simoninns/decode-orc/issues) (please make your issue's on those repositorys if it does not affect tape related functions/codebase)

### Bug Description

<!--
Please provide a clear and concise description of the bug you encountered.
-->

### Steps to Reproduce

<!--
Outline the steps to reproduce the bug:
-->

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

### Expected Behaviour

<!--
Explain what you expected to happen when performing the steps above.
-->

### Actual Behaviour

<!--
Explain what actually happened when performing the steps above. Include any error messages or unexpected behaviour.
-->

### Environment

<!--
Include information on your environment.
-->

- Decode version: [e.g., v0.3.4]
- Operating System: [e.g., Windows 10, macOS 14.3, Linux Mint 22.1)]
- Hardware Used: [e.g., Ryzen 7 7950x, Apple M3 Max, 16GB DDDR5-4400mhz, SSD NVME Gen 3 etc]

### Additional Information

<!--
Include any additional information that might be relevant to the bug report, such as screenshots or related issues/Pull-Requests.
-->
